channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Asus Zenbook A16 (2026) Review: Savor the Power, Ignore the Beige
item.description: This $2,000 Asus laptop delivers breathtaking performance thanks to Qualcomm's Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme, but at the cost of nearly everything else.

item.title: Man Utd vs Liverpool Live Streams: How to watch Premier League 2025/26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Man Utd vs Liverpool live streams online and from anywhere, as two Premier League heavyweights collide at Old Trafford.

item.title: Le Samsung Galaxy S25 profite d’une occasion unique grâce aux French Days pour être en promo à -164 €
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy S26 est le dernier smartphone en date de la marque, dans sa version de base, qui est déjà très bonne puisque notée 7/10. Il se retrouve à 684,99 euros au lieu de 849 euros sur Rakuten aujourd'hui seulement.

item.title: Adobe's legal chief calls for creator protection as policymakers and tech companies reframe copyright in the era of AI
item.description: While the world establishes copyright for AI-generated assets, Adobe's legal chief calls for greater creator protection and asset verification.

item.title: 15 Best Gifts for Plant Lovers and Gardeners (2026)
item.description: From smart apps and planters to unique tools, these gifts will turn even a black thumb into a next-level plant parent.

item.title: How to Track Your Luggage (2026): AirTag, Pebblebee, CaseSafe
item.description: A Bluetooth tracker can prevent vacation hell, aka arriving at the beach sans bathing suit. Here are our travel tips for using one.

item.title: How the race for critical minerals is creating ‘sacrifice zones,’ impacting the world’s poorest people
item.description: Without binding regulations, mining for critical minerals will worsen the lives of some of the world’s poorest people. There is a troubling contradiction at the heart of the global transition to a cleaner, greener, tech-driven future: Modern technologies—everything from AI to wind turbines, as well as cellphones, electric vehicles and defense systems—depend on critical minerals. But many of the communities where those minerals are mined end up with polluted water and poorer health because of the mining....

item.title: Une nouvelle fédération française a été piratée : les données de 2 millions de personnes compromises
item.description: La Fédération française de basketball indique avoir subi une importante fuite de données personnelles, touchant potentiellement 2 millions de licenciés et 900 000 de leurs représentants légaux.

item.title: Best Travel Tote Bags for Every Kind of Excursion (2026): Away, Le Pliage, Topo Designs
item.description: These hardworking travel totes handle everything from a work trip to a weekend getaway.

item.title: Im watching the Miami GP for free this weekend — how to live stream F1 for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the Miami GP from the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch F1 live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Should a print subscription be considered? I used HP’s All-In Plan for two months to find out
item.description: Is the all-in-one approach for you or your business?

item.title: Microsoft's CEO promised the world to consumers in a speech about fixing Windows 11 — but one thing Satya Nadella said worries me
item.description: Satya Nadella talking about consumers in relation to Windows 11 is mostly reassuring, with a notable exception.

item.title: Verizon deal includes not one, not two, but four Galaxy S26 on a super cheap unlimited plan — and you don't have to trade
item.description: Verizon's latest deal on the Galaxy S26 waives the trade-in criteria, gets you up to four devices for cheap, and even throws in a tablet and smartwatch.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Glasses, Google Photos et Gemini : tout ce qu’il ne fallait pas rater – L’actu tech de la semaine
item.description: Des lunettes connectées Samsung, un bug Google Photos et des évolutions pour Gemini. Voici ce qui a marqué l'actu tech de la semaine.
